questions.question: Explain the difference between a probabilistic and a deterministic approach to reasoning under uncertainty in the context of Artificial Intelligence. Provide an example of each approach.
questions.hint: Focus on the strengths and limitations of each approach

questions.question: A Bayesian network has a variable X with two possible values, A and B. The conditional probability table for X given A is P(X|A) = 0.7 and P(X|B) = 0.3. Find the probability of X given B, P(X|B).
questions.hint: Use the definition of conditional probability

questions.question: Describe the main difference between a Bayesian classifier and a decision tree classifier in the context of Statistical Reasoning. Provide an example to illustrate the difference.
questions.hint: Focus on the decision-making process of each classifier
